title: scutellaria deltoidea
intro: Scutellaria deltoidea, also known as prairie skullcap or mad dog skullcap, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Scutellaria deltoidea include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and improving cognitive function. Scutellaria deltoidea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule for its herbal benefits, with recommended dosages varying depending on the individual's needs and health status.
